import pytest
from source import gcd

def test_gcd_recursive_bug():
    # This test reveals the bug where the recursive call uses (a % b, b) instead of (b, a % b)
    # With the buggy version, gcd(35, 21) will cause infinite recursion since a % b < b
    # and the arguments don't change properly in the recursive call
    result = gcd(35, 21)
    assert result == 7, f"gcd(35, 21) should be 7, but got {result}"
